h1.visual_description: Large, bold, serif font, typically preceded by a large standalone chapter number on the line above.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Equation label, right-aligned with the mathematical expression.
Internal reference to a numbered mathematical formula.
Footnote text located at the bottom of the page, separated by a horizontal rule.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX / MathJax for both inline variables (e.g., $b^i$, $\mathbf{e}$) and centered block equations.
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Superscript numeric footnotes for supplemental notes; parenthetical numbering for equations.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Standalone chapter numbers at the top of chapter start pages; horizontal separator line followed by small-font footnotes at the bottom margin.
